credential-mismatch.description: Claude uses credentials or account data from the wrong project or environment
credential-mismatch.prevention: Confirm which project and account context before accessing any credentials or external service data

guardrail.description: Verify data source context before credential access

wrong-account.description: Claude opens or queries the wrong account/profile in an external service
wrong-account.prevention: Explicitly state which account ID or profile to use before any external service interaction

guardrail.description: Verify account context before external service access

data-loss-risk.description: A database operation (DELETE, DROP, migration) could destroy data without backup
data-loss-risk.prevention: Create a backup or snapshot before any destructive database operation

missing-backup.description: Migration proceeds without verifying backup exists
missing-backup.prevention: Verify backup exists and is recent before running migration

untested-code.description: Code is deployed or pushed without running tests first
untested-code.prevention: Run full test suite before any push or deploy operation

broken-ci.description: Push breaks CI pipeline due to untested dependency or config change
broken-ci.prevention: Check CI config and dependency changes before pushing

scope-creep.description: Refactoring expands beyond original scope, touching unrelated files
scope-creep.prevention: Define exact file list before starting. Flag any file not in the original scope.

breaking-imports.description: Renaming or moving files breaks import paths in dependent modules
breaking-imports.prevention: Search for all import references before renaming. Update all references atomically.

missing-edge-cases.description: Tests cover happy path but miss error handling and boundary conditions
missing-edge-cases.prevention: For each test, add at least one error case and one boundary case

flaky-tests.description: New tests pass locally but fail intermittently due to timing or state leakage
flaky-tests.prevention: Isolate test state. Avoid shared mutable state between tests. Use temp directories.
